title: Data Transformation (SMT)
description: Application developer configures SMT transforms for routing and filtering change events via scripting languages or WASM modules

actors.name: ApplicationDeveloper
actors.description: Configures SMT transforms (ContentBasedRouter, Filter) on a Kafka Connect connector

actors.name: KafkaConnectPlatform
actors.description: Applies registered SMT chain to each ConnectRecord in the pipeline

actors.name: BenchmarkHarness
actors.description: JMH runner that drives FilterSmtPerf and SmtOverheadPerf benchmarks

use_cases.name: Configure ContentBasedRouter
use_cases.description: Set language + topic.expression; records are rerouted to new topic when expression returns non-null string

use_cases.name: Configure Filter SMT
use_cases.description: Set language + condition; records are dropped when boolean expression returns false

use_cases.name: Select Scripting Language / Engine
use_cases.description: Choose JSR223 language (jsr223.groovy, jsr223.graal.js) or WASM runtime (wasm.chicory, wasm.chicory-interpreter)

use_cases.name: Apply Null Handling Policy
use_cases.description: Configure null.handling.mode: keep (pass through), drop (remove), evaluate (pass to engine)

use_cases.name: Route Record to New Topic
use_cases.description: ContentBasedRouter.doApply() calls engine.eval(record, String.class); if non-null builds record.newRecord(topicName,...)
call_chain: → record.newRecord(topicName, partition, keySchema, key, valueSchema, value, timestamp, headers)

use_cases.name: Filter Out Change Event
use_cases.description: Filter.doApply() calls engine.eval(record, Boolean.class); returns null (drop) if false
call_chain: → true → return record | false → return null (dropped)

use_cases.name: Benchmark Filter SMT Performance
use_cases.description: FilterSmtPerf compares NativeFilter vs Groovy/JS/Chicory/ChicoryInterpreter Filter implementations using JMH @Benchmark

use_cases.name: Measure SMT Overhead (NoOp vs NewRecord)
use_cases.description: SmtOverheadPerf measures baseline cost of SMT invocation with NoOp (pass-through) vs NewRecord (copy) vs empty base()

key_classes.name: NativeFilter
key_classes.doApply_logic: Java-native: drop record if op==DELETE, else pass through

key_classes.name: TransformState (FilterSmtPerf)
key_classes.setup: @Setup(Level.Trial) doSetup() — initializes schema, records, and all filter variants

key_classes.name: TransformState (SmtOverheadPerf)
key_classes.setup: @Setup(Level.Trial) doSetup() — initializes schema, records, NoOp, NewRecord

relationships: FilterSmtPerf.TransformState holds nativeFilter + scripting Filter instances
important_notes: All SMTs are @Incubating. Language must start with 'jsr223.' or 'wasm.' else DebeziumException. ContentBasedRouter routes by returning new topic name (null = keep original). Filter drops by returning null. Benchmarks use JMH Mode.Throughput with microsecond units. WASM engines (chicory) load .wasm files from debezium-microbenchmark/src/main/resources/wasm/.
